/etc/motd.content:
Welcome to GregOS.
Type 'help' for available commands.

/etc/fstab.content:
# /etc/fstab - GregOS filesystem table
#
# <device>       <mount>      <type>   <options>        <dump> <pass>
/dev/sda1        /            gregfs   defaults         0      1
proc             /proc        proc     defaults         0      0
tmpfs            /tmp         tmpfs    defaults         0      0
/dev/rf0         /mnt/rf0     auto     noauto,user      0      0

/sys/firmware/bios.content:
GregBIOS 1.2
Vendor:       Gregory Alan Computing, Inc.
Release Date: 01/22/1987
ROM Size:     64 KB

Revision History:
  1.0  1985-03-14  Initial POST, 8-bit bus, 640K memory test
  1.1  1986-08-22  rf0 antenna controller, extended memory detect
  1.2  1987-01-22  Boot device priority, shipped with GregOS 1.1
